notes: Wine count: 10 wines. Confidence distribution: 7 high, 2 medium, 1 pending full verification. Product URLs flagged as stale by Lena (8 of 10 marked PENDING_VERIFICATION). Traits sourced from: varietal/regional profile standards, critic notes provided in Lena's JSON, customer ratings. All tannin values are 1 (white wines have minimal tannin). Alcohol standardized to 3-4 for budget whites ($13-$20 range, typical 12-13% ABV). Acidity and body vary by varietal: SB/Riesling high acidity (4-5); Chardonnay/Pinot Grigio moderate (3); Chablis elevated (4); Pinot Blanc light (3).
